phrases.intent_en: Where is the Underwater Archaeology Museum?
phrases.cultural_note: Museum is spread across castle levels; exact entrance is not in the venue context.

likely_response.translation_en: Inside the castle, at the end of the main path.

responses.english: Inside the castle, at the end of the main path.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I buy castle tickets?
phrases.cultural_note: Ticket booth location is confirmed in the venue context.

likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket booth at the main gate.

responses.english: At the ticket booth at the main gate.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I rent an audio guide?
phrases.cultural_note: Audio guide rental desk exists, but its exact location is not in the venue context.

likely_response.translation_en: At the entrance, on the right.

responses.english: At the entrance, on the right.

phrases.cultural_note: Mausoleum stones are in the walls; specific tower is not specified in the venue context.

likely_response.translation_en: In the walls of the English Tower.

responses.english: In the walls of the English Tower.

phrases.intent_en: Is flash photography allowed in Glass Wreck Hall?
phrases.text_local: Cam Batığı Salonu'nda flaşlı fotoğraf çekmek yasak mı?
phrases.cultural_note: A direct, firm rule is standard for artifact preservation in Turkish museums.

likely_response.translation_en: No flash in the exhibit halls.

responses.english: No flash in the exhibit halls.

phrases.cultural_note: The Mausoleum stones are a distinctive historical feature; a guide can point them out.

phrases.intent_en: Is flash photography allowed in Glass Wreck Hall?
phrases.text_local: Cam Batığı Salonu'nda flaşlı fotoğraf çekmek serbest mi?
phrases.cultural_note: No flash photography rule applies to exhibits; Glass Wreck Hall is a specific exhibit area.

likely_response.local: Sergi salonlarında flaşlı fotoğraf çekmek yasak.
likely_response.translation_en: Flash photography is prohibited in the exhibit halls.

responses.english: Flash photography is prohibited in the exhibit halls.
responses.local: Sergi salonlarında flaşlı fotoğraf çekmek yasak.
